raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 258 will grant Fresno County the authority to develop and implement an individualized county child care plan.",
    "AB 258 will allow Fresno County to utilize approximately $9.6 million under the state’s subsidized child care program that was previously being returned to the state.",
    "AB 258 will result in approximately 1,300 more children receiving child care in Fresno County.",
    "AB 258 will enable child care providers to better meet the needs of children and working families.",
    "AB 258 will improve access to state subsidized child care programs.",
    "AB 258 will strengthen the fragile child care and development infrastructure without requiring additional state funding.",
    "Over 1.2 million children and working families in California are denied the childcare they need to thrive."
  ]
}
```
